results.title: RBI Plans Polymer Notes: Waterproof Currency May Soon Replace Paper Notes
results.description: #ଓଦ ା_ହେଲେ_ନଷ୍ଟ_ହେବନି, #କ ି_ପୁରୁଣା_ବି_ହେବନି ଦେଶରେ ଖୁବଶୀଘ୍ର ଆସିବ ପଲିମର ବା ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ୍ ନୋଟ। କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ବଦଳରେ ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ୍ ନୋଟ୍ ଆଣିବାକୁ RBIର ଯୋଜନା। ଏନେଇ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ଥିବା କହିଛନ୍ତି RBI ଗଭର୍ଣ୍ଣର। କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ମୁଦ୍ରଣରେ ଅଧିକ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ହେଉଥିବାରୁ RBI ଏଭଳି ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇଛି। ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ ନୋଟ୍ ୱାଟରପ୍ରୁଫ୍ ରହିବା ଫଳରେ କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ତୁଳନାରେ ଅଧିକ ଦିନ ତିଷ୍ଠିବ ବୋଲି କୁହାଯାଉଛି India may soon see the introduction of polymer, or plastic, currency notes as the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) considers replacing traditional paper notes. According to the report, the proposal is currently at a preliminary stage, and the RBI Governor has indicated that the plan is under consideration. The move is aimed at reducing the high cost associated with printing paper currency. #EconomyNews_RBI #PolymerNotes #PlasticCurrency #RBIGovernor #CurrencyReform #IndianEconomy #WaterproofNotes #BankingNews #PolymerNotes_India #PlasticCurrency_RBI #CurrencyChange_India #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel.
